basics.name: Alex Milkov
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: More recent expertise in blockchain and protocol development on Solana. Background in distributed systems and programming language theory. Strongest across TypeScript, Go, Rust backend systems and shipping end-to-end products for small teams. Have picked up FE and devops in recent years and can ramp quickly on any domain

highlights: Boutique software consultancy focused on Solana, Rust, Typescript, backend systems, and shipping end-to-end products for small teams.

Nation (Oct 2022 - (advisory) Present): Built products across Nation's Solana ecosystem, including the core DAO platform, Vellum (a DocuSign-like document signing product on Solana with GPT-assisted drafting and post-signature actions), and Caro (a low-latency real-time auction engine embedded in Shopify storefronts).

Render Foundation (May 2023 - (advisory) Present):  Sole engineer for Render's Ethereum-to-Solana migration (top-25 CMC project). Anchor programs (burn-mint equil, payments, token bridge, cNFT tokenization), TypeScript services/cranks, adhoc CEX migrations (custodying and burning $1B+ in tokens for Binance), payment channel automation, FE dashboards, accounting, and full EKS infrastructure (Grafana/Prometheus/Loki/Tempo, PagerDuty, Vault + bank-vaults secret injection, automated postgres and redis backups to ECS). Hired and led the team to hand off to
CFI (Jan 2026 - Present): Building onchain lending infrastructure for agricultural loans, including Solana programs, backend services, and surrounding product and ops systems.

OTOY Studio (May 2026 - Present): Scaling backend infrastructure for OTOY's AI media platform (canvas.otoy.ai). Media pipeline architecture across FAL inference, Neon Postgres, and Cloudflare R2. Streaming asset copy via Cloudflare Workers, webhook-based job completion, schema hardening, and real-time notification layer.
Inventory team: Backend end services (Go) which manage merchant inventory (counts, costs, etc) and provide reporting

Items team: Backend service (Go) which manages merchant catalogs (what they sell). Datastore is sharded MySQL. Search is backed by Elasticsearch. Rearchitected next generation of this service which is a generic object store all teams can use, backed again by MySQL

Introduced Rust to Square by porting internal libraries necessary to run a service in Square's environments. (gRPC + HTTP server framework, clients, custom protobuf compiler, admin console, MySQL + Redis integration, logging, metrics, Envoy, builds, feeds, jobs, etc)
Lots of design docs, PR reviews, interviews, and documentation writing

Full stack work on isomorphic system - Scala.js + React bindings, Scala backend (heavy functional programming shop) - enabling operators to remotely manage the configuration of hundreds of thousands of newly rolled out networking devices

Migrated services to EKS (AWS's managed Kubernetes) and carved out best practices and recommended tooling (Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, Loki, nginx-ingress, etc) as part of org-wide migration to IBM Cloud
Responsible for developing and maintaining user profile system (Scala) that manages all user data such as subscriptions, locations, demographics, and device endpoints
Responsible for developing and maintaining alerting system (Scala), which fetches user subscriptions, populates content templates, and distributes them to devices
Lead initiatives to adopt libraries and develop tooling in the purely functional side of the Scala ecosystem. Mentored engineers in functional programming language theory
